title: Study Session Ready Confirmations — SPD Parking Follow-Up and iSol HR Scope
summary: Quick confirmations on items 10-26. Eric Annis (chief development officer) follows up on the alternative parking location (1320 West Fayette) for SPD 1153 move: the site is 1300 ft from the building vs 850 ft for the pump track, has a narrow parcel limiting parking capacity, and lacks Westside Trail connectivity. SPD previously evaluated and rejected it. Brief question on whether iSol/Applicant Pro (item 10) covers fire and police; clarification deferred to HR. Councilor Ehrenreich notes she will abstain from item 24 (Cornell Cooperative camp) as her children are enrolled.
